beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: France vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 2
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: France vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 2
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: France have never lost against Morocco, with all five of their previous meetings coming in friendlies. The most recent encounter was a 2-2 draw in Saint-Denis in November 2007. France have alternated between victory and defeat in their six World Cup meetings with African nations, losing 1-0 against Tunisia last time out in this year's group stage.

beIN SPORTS 9.title: Day 2 - Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup
beIN SPORTS 9.desc: Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup 2026 concludes the Doha Equestrian Tour at Al Shaqab, bringing together more than 200 riders in CSI1* to CSI5* show jumping classes and a total prize purse of €784,000. The competition features ranking classes, Grand Prix action and decisive Jump-Off rounds, where faults and time determine the winners.

beIN SPORTS XTRA 2.title: Race 2 - FIA European Truck Championship - Misano Round -2026
